steps.title: Follow the cross-cultural link
steps.content: The study found that the five-factor framework captured participants' Western music preferences across 53 countries and that similar correlations appeared between those preference factors and personality traits. The conclusion should preserve that cross-cultural personality-preference relationship.

steps.title: Avoid claims beyond the study
steps.content: B extends the finding to non-Western music, C invents previous assumptions, and D introduces familiarity with Western music, which the text does not measure. The supported inference is that similar personality profiles tend to align with similar Western music preferences across cultures. The answer is A.
